response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the resume shows no relevant background in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator performance analysis, SIMD/MIMD architectures, GPU workloads, or deep learning optimization. The role requires a Principal-level hardware/performance architect, and the candidate's expertise sits in application-layer software engineering. Educational path also does not match (BS in CS with relevant experience exists, but the relevant experience is not in hardware/AI accelerator domains).
strengths: Long track record of senior software engineering across multiple stacks
Some low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic with DLang
Strong testing/TDD discipline and craftsmanship mindset
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware-software co-design experience
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or DNN optimization background
Currently on a career gap and profile is application-software focused, not hardware/performance architecture

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
